headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Arista Networks (ANET) After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
summary: Wondering if Arista Networks at about US$147.81 per share still offers fair value, or if the best part of the opportunity has already passed you by. The stock has gained 4.3% over the past week, is down 4.2% over the past month, yet is up 10.6% year to date and 53.9% over the past year, with a very large 3 year and 5 year return that suggests investors have already priced in a lot of optimism. Recent coverage has focused on Arista Networks as a key beneficiary of long term trends in...

headline: Institutional investors boosted holdings of AI infrastructure plays during first quarter
summary: Institutional investors were eager buyers of stocks in companies whose fate hinges on the rollout and adoption of artificial intelligence during the first quarter of 2026, ‌according to a Reuters overview of filings by nearly 6,000 hedge funds, pension funds, college endowments and ‌other asset managers with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.  These quarterly 13-F filings, which provide insight into how some major investors reacted to emerging opportunities ​and new sources of risk or anxiety during the three-month period, show that more than 4,000 of them added to their existing holdings or initiated new positions in a group of nine companies that are big players in the AI infrastructure arena, including Oracle, Arista Networks and Vertiv.

headline: HSBC Just Upgraded Cisco to Buy: $6 Billion AI Revenue Goal Resets the Growth Debate
summary: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) just earned a strong endorsement from HSBC, which upgraded the networking giant to Buy from Hold and lifted its price target to $137 from $77. The trigger is straightforward: management’s AI infrastructure order book is accelerating, and Cisco now expects fiscal 2027 AI revenue of at least $6 billion. For prudent investors, ... headline: Raymond James raises Arista Networks on AI expansion and 2027 growth outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Raymond James upgraded Arista Networks to Outperform with a price target of $164 per share in a note on Friday, citing improving growth prospects in 2027 and beyond as the networking company expands into new AI applications and gains market share in both the AI back-end and enterprise campus segments.
